architecture_summary: Add a repository-local Causal Dependency-Gated Recursive Component Convergence Mesh runtime. The runtime separates containment from dependency topology, schedules continuation frames independently, resolves exact projection requests recursively, validates and reconciles candidates outside component code, propagates projection-scoped invalidation, classifies cycles, solves declared semantic feedback regions, persists causal runtime state, and issues closure certificates only for a quiescent active required closure. External effects remain delegated to the existing governed action boundary.
data_model_changes: add immutable component contracts and convergence policies
add exact projection dependency requests with settlement, gate, consistency, assumption, freshness, fallback, and quorum fields
add independently schedulable continuation frames with causal resume points
add versioned projection certificates carrying dependency-certificate lineage and evidence scope
add append-only causal audit events and invalidation records
add separate containment and dependency topology stores
add deterministic runtime snapshots that exclude executable component code
add closure-gated external-effect plans and receipts
rollback_plan: Remove the convergence package, focused tests, component schema, Foundation example, validator, documentation, and SDLC requirement/design artifacts. Rerun import compilation, focused runtime tests, schema validation, SDLC validation, proof coverage checks, and workspace governance preflight before claiming rollback closure.
migration_plan: No existing runtime is replaced. The new package is additive and unregistered by default. Existing SNet, workflow, cognitive-loop, and Universal Action surfaces continue unchanged unless a caller explicitly constructs the convergence kernel or adapter. No persistent store migration, public endpoint, connector binding, or deployment change is included.
